query_title: The Six Wives of Henry Lefay

recommendations.title: Ismael's Ghosts
recommendations.overview: Just as the disheveled and alcoholic filmmaker Ismaël embarks on a difficult new film project, his life is sent into a tailspin. His wife Carlotta, presumed dead for 20 years, come crashing back into his life creating chaos in his work and his curren

recommendations.title: My Favorite Wife
recommendations.overview: Years after she was presumed dead in a shipwreck, Ellen Arden returns home to the surprise of her husband recently remarrying. But he too gets a shock when he learns that Ellen spent her time alone on an island with another man.

recommendations.title: August 15th
recommendations.overview: Three men are abandonned by their wives for a few days in the summer holidays. They are alone with five kids to feed and a house to maintain. And they will learn what they did wrong with their wives.

recommendations.title: A Vampire in the Family
recommendations.overview: Fernandinho is a family man, former football player and a current podcast commentator that is surprised by the visit of his inconvenient brother-in-law, Gregorio, who discovers to be lazy and literally a bloodsucker - a vampire.

recommendations.title: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers
recommendations.overview: Six years after being presumed dead in a fire, and just as the town prepares to finally celebrate Halloween again, Michael Myers returns to Haddonfield to continue his reign of terror.

recommendations.title: Brothers
recommendations.overview: When his helicopter goes down during his fourth tour of duty in Afghanistan, Marine Sam Cahill is presumed dead. Back home, brother Tommy steps in to look over Sam’s wife, Grace, and two children. Sam’s surprise homecoming triggers domestic mayhem.

recommendations.title: The Sense of an Ending
recommendations.overview: A man becomes haunted by his past and is presented with a mysterious legacy that causes him to re-think his current situation in life.

recommendations.title: Waking the Dead
recommendations.overview: A congressional candidate questions his sanity after seeing the love of his life, presumed dead, suddenly emerge.

recommendations.title: Eulogy
recommendations.overview: A black comedy that follows three generations of a family, who come together for the funeral of the patriarch - unveiling a litany of family secrets and covert relationships.

recommendations.title: The Martian
recommendations.overview: During a manned mission to Mars, Astronaut Mark Watney is presumed dead after a fierce storm and left behind by his crew. But Watney has survived and finds himself stranded and alone on the hostile planet. With only meager supplies, he must draw upon
